title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Barclays Anderson Consulting Services Limited
body: "Application number 5495  Applicant Barclays Bank UK Plc objected to the name used by Barclays Anderson Consulting Services Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
